classifications.phrase: A further pick-up in wages growth is expected as the labour market tightens.
A further, but only gradual, pick-up in underlying inflation is expected.
The central forecast is for underlying inflation to reach 2½ per cent over 2023.
The Board will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the…
This will require the labour market to be tight enough to generate wages growth that…
the Board is prepared to be patient.

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish hold with conditional hawkishness: acknowledging inflation and labour market tightening but committing to patience and no rate rises until inflation sustainably reaches target, reflecting accommodation despite emerging price pressures.
